misc.title: #ONEPIECE1184 Mihawk mother(if) is moving different. She is the female Garling... Holy Knight Candle is coming. Stussy Sama - Dawn&Dusk (@DawnStussy) 【Lost in Translation by a Native Japanese Speaker】
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1184 Mihawk mother(if) is moving different. She is the female Garling... Holy Knight Candle is coming. Stussy Sama - Dawn&Dusk (@DawnStussy) 【Lost in Translation by a Native Japanese Speaker】 Although the kanji and pronounce are different, Candel uses a self-proclaimed title very similar to Somers’s. Sommars: I am the "懐剣: concealed dagger" of the Holy Land, Mariejois.’ Candel: I am your "懐刀: trusted dagger" Both terms basically refer to a small dagger carried close to the body for self-defense. That alone isn’t enough to conclude that Candel is a member of the Shepherd family, and it would be premature to make that claim. However, it does seem like there may be some kind of connection between Candel and Somers. It’s even possible that Somers is fond of Candel and started using a similar title because of her. That could be the story behind it. — https://nitter.net/DawnStussy/status/2061104786540540304#m
